examples: She was an accomplished pianist, a superb swimmer, and a gifted artist.
He was a natural politician, a gifted orator who knew how to work a crowd.
Michael may have been a dunce at mathematics, but he was gifted at languages.
Why, he asked, had his gifted young friend turned his back on everything that had made him successful?
Anybody who knows her history knows what a strong, determined and gifted person she was.
